catalog_content:
Item Name: Icing Images® Paper Potion™ Paper Conditioner - 2 oz
Bullet Point 1: Paper conditioner for various types of edible paper
Bullet Point 2: Allows edible paper to be molded and shaped without cracking
Bullet Point 3: Vanilla scented
Bullet Point 4: Evaporates quickly
Bullet Point 5: Certified Kosher
Product Description: Icing Images Paper Potion is an edible paper conditioner that temporarily moisturizes the paper, allowing for it to be easily shaped and molded. Papers that might normally crack when bent or folded, such as wafer paper, will remain flexible enough to mold into flowers, butterflies and other three-dimensional pieces. Paper Potion has a vanilla scent, evaporates quickly and can also help to rehydrate icing sheets. Certified Kosher.
Value: 2.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Specialty craft product designed for edible paper shaping, positioned as a functional tool for cake decorators and bakers. Mid-range pricing likely due to niche market and specialized use. Kosher certification adds credibility but does not indicate premium pricing. Plastic bottle packaging is standard for liquids, with no luxury cues visible.

Bullet Point 1: PURE RAW HONEY - Contains 2 boxes of 20 packets each, total of 40 raw honey packets

Bullet Point 5: SQUEEZEABLE - Packed in convenient 0.4 ounce packets to easily squeeze into your favorite beverage, or top your morning bagel or oatmeal
Product Description: Let’s be real. Some products seem less than transparent about where they’re from and what they contain. That's why America’s most well-known honey is now introducing Busy Bee Raw Unfiltered Honey. This new Busy Bee Raw Honey features on-package product transparency information to give you a deeper understanding of how and where your Busy Bee Raw Honey was made. With our true traceability, you’ll always know which flowers the bees used to make this honey, and where in the U.S.A. it was produced and packed. Not only that, we test Busy Bee Raw Honey for safety and quality — and three times for purity. So when it reaches your table, you’ll know it’s Real Honest Honey.
Value: nan
Unit: None
overall_summary: Premium positioning with 'U.S. Grade A' and 'traceable' claims suggests higher value. Convenient single-serve packaging and quality testing justify mid-to-premium pricing. Bundle format (40 packets) offers value for bulk consumers.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Luster Dust - Nu Silver (4g 1x Jar) | Edible Vegan Dust & Paint for Cake Decorating, Ice Cream, Desserts, Cocktails and Beverages by Bakell
Bullet Point 1: 💕 Dual Use: When you buy Bakell's Luster Dust, you're getting two products for the price of one! Luster Dust (except GOLDS) can be used as both a cake decorating dust and a beverage garnish! Add it to your favorite cocktail or soft drink to create a silky, shimmering effect that swirls your beverage to life!
Bullet Point 2: 👀 Captivating Hues: Our Luster Dusts come in over 40 colors, ensuring a captivating tone for cakes and vegan paint applications for any occasion.
Bullet Point 3: 🛡️ Bakell prioritizes your health by carefully selecting the highest quality ingredients, to create the safest and best product on the market.
Bullet Point 4: 🎉 Perfect for parties, holidays, birthdays, weddings, graduations, cocktails, mocktails, beer, garnishes, juice, teas, lemonade, coffee, & more!
Bullet Point 5: 🌿 We are the only edible glitter company whose products are made in the USA at SQF III, GMP, Halal, & Kosher certified facilities, & are nut free, gluten free, & vegan.
Bullet Point 6: 🎯 The convenient flip cap design provides ease and precision, ensuring an even distribution of luster for your treats and drinks.
Product Description: Enhance your confections with Nu Silver Luster Dust. This edible powder is meticulously crafted to add captivating hues to a wide range of treats, while the convenient flip cap design ensures convenient and precise application. But that’s not all—this versatile luster dust doubles as an edible beverage garnish, creating a silky, shimmering swirl when added, making it perfect for cocktails, mocktails, and other beverages. Imagine the sparkle as it swirls in your favorite drinks, adding a magical touch to any occasion. Whether you're a professional pastry chef, a mixologist, a passionate baker, or someone who loves decorating cakes and drinks, this luster dust offers a seamless way to add an elegant and visually appealing touch to your delightful treats and beverages.
Value: 0.14
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Specialty edible glitter product for cake decorating and beverage garnishing, positioned as a premium, multi-use food additive. Small 0.14 oz jar suggests a niche, craft-oriented market with higher per-unit pricing. Certifications (SQF III, GMP, Halal, Kosher) and vegan/gluten-free claims support premium positioning, though basic plastic jar packaging may limit perceived luxury. Dual-use functionality (cakes and drinks) adds value but may not justify significant price premium over single-use alternatives.
